name: Bug Report
description: File a bug report to help us improve The Syllabus Sync
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
body:

- type: markdown
  attributes:
  value: | ## 🐛 Bug Description
  A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

      ## 📍 Expected Behavior
      What you expected to happen.

      ## 🎯 Actual Behavior
      What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots if possible.

      ## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
      Detailed steps to reproduce the behavior:
      1. Go to...
      2. Click on...
      3. Scroll down to...
      4. See error

      ## 🖥️ Environment
      - **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
      - **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120.0, Firefox 121.0, Safari 17.0]
      - **Device**: [e.g. Desktop, Mobile, Tablet]
      - **Version**: [e.g. v1.0.0-rc.8]

      ## 📝 Additional Context
      Add any other context about the problem here.

      ## 🏷️ Labels (optional)
      Suggest labels for this issue:
      - `type: bug`
      - `component: [component-name]`
      - `severity: [critical/high/medium/low]`
      - `priority: [urgent/normal/low]`
